provenance.author: Enheduanna
source_refs: Sjöberg, Å.W. & Bergmann, E. The Collection of the Sumerian Temple Hymns (TCS 3)

deity.name: Ishkur
deity.epithet: Canal inspector of heaven and earth

theo_slots.hymn_signature: Temple Hymn 27: E-Ishkur of Ishkur at Karkara (ETCSL t.4.80.1 / TCS 3)
Temple Hymn 28: E-fragmentary-28 — Unknown @ Unknown. ETCSL lines 352–362 fragmentary colophon
Temple Hymn 29: E-mah-Adab — Ninhursag @ Adab. Also associated with Ashgi as temple prince

Temple Hymn 31: Kun-satu of Numushda at Kazallu (ETCSL t.4.80.1 / TCS 3)
